title: BEM-824 verify queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:54 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
resp=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
if resp:
    status='response_files_present_filter_needed'; next_action='filter real Claude response'
elif runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'):
    status='runtime_seen_after_bem822_queue'; next_action='diagnose Claude runtime outcome'
elif results:
    status='dispatch_results_present_after_bem822_queue'; next_action='parse dispatch results'
elif marker.get('status'):
    status='processor_marker_seen_no_results_after_bem822'; next_action='processor ran but no result files; patch shell loop'
else:
    status='processor_marker_missing_after_bem822'; next_action='processor step not executing; repair runner placement'
state={'bem':'BEM-824','status':status,'results':results[-20:],'marker':marker,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'responses':resp[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem824_verify_bem822_queue_result.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem824_verify_bem822_queue_result.md').write_text('# BEM-824 | Verify BEM-822 Queue Result | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem824_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-824'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem824_verify_bem822_queue_result.json','governance/reports/bem824_verify_bem822_queue_result.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem824_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified result files, processor marker, Claude runtime, and response files after BEM-822 queue item tick')
"""
